text.title: cd-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cd-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents copy "Phase X: Y weeks" timelines from planning documents into roadmaps.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Project policy prohibits time estimates in SDD documents. Replace with complexity tiers (Low/Medium/High) and token estimates.

failure-mode.description: Using the in-process feature flag cache from the README in production (in-process dict cache).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An in-process cache hides flag changes for hours or until the process restarts. Use an SSE/WebSocket-based flag SDK or a very short TTL (under 60 seconds) in production.

failure-mode.description: Agents will copy the methodology's "Phase X: Y weeks" verbatim.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Project policy bans time estimates. Strip and replace with complexity tiers.

failure-mode.description: "Implement feature flags" prompts produce the methodology's in-process cache snippet; in production this hides flag changes for hours.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use SSE/WebSocket-based flag SDK or short TTL (under 60 seconds).

failure-mode.description: Agents conflate Continuous Delivery and Continuous Deployment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The matrix in this methodology is the source of truth — quote it back.

failure-mode.description: Migration: agents merge expand and contract into one PR ("less work").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force two-PR rule; each deploy must be independently rollback-safe.

failure-mode.description: DORA: agents will compute "deploy frequency" from `git push` events.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Correct definition is successful production deployments. Wire to the deploy job, not push.

failure-mode.description: "Reduce E2E to make CI faster" — agents will delete tests rather than parallelize.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add a CI-time budget and a coverage floor; parallelize instead.

failure-mode.description: Release boards / change tickets: agents will paste the same boilerplate ticket per deploy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Templatize once and link the deploy SHA, don't regenerate.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Readiness should fail when dependencies are down; liveness should not. Keep them separate.
